title: Misaki Is a Maid!
overview: Student school president Misaki is overly stern due to some tough going in her life. This sparks the interest of exceptional student Usui.

title: A Maid Even at the Campus Festival!
overview: A school festival brings Misaki and Usui closer.

title: What Color is Misaki? Natural Color?
overview: Usui has some good ideas for Misaki.

title: Net Idol Aoi
overview: Maid Latte is visited by Aoi, a famous net idol who is also Satsuki's niece. Aoi is excited to try the café's uniform, much to Satsuki's chagrin. Meanwhile, Takumi helps out in the café's kitchen. Aoi finds Takumi attractive but he ignores her.

title: First Time Minding the Shop
overview: Satsuki warns Misaki about a group of stalkers targeting cosplay cafés, but Misaki isn't worried. On a night when Misaki is closing the café alone, she is caught by the stalkers. It falls to Takumi to rescue her.

title: Men & the Ayuzawa Cram School
overview: Misaki aquires a group of fans at school-- the Inuyama quintuplets. They want to know everything about her, but this could reveal her secret part-time job. She is torn between telling the truth and risking the good reputation she has with them.

title: Enter the Student Council President of Miyabigaoka
overview: A phone call from Sakura and Shizuko prompts Misaki to stop a fight between two Seika High students and three students from the prestigious Miyabigaoka Academy. When she brings the two Seika students to Miyabigaoka Academy to apologize, Takumi tags along.

title: Misaki Goes to Miyabigaoka
overview: Given three days to decide, Misaki is torn about accepting the Miyabigaoka scholarship. When she finally goes to Miyabigaoka to give her answer, Sakura and Shizuko are worried since Seika High wouldn't be what it is today without Misaki.

title: Maid-Sama Does Momotaro
overview: Takumi narrates a strange retelling of Momotar with Misaki as the titular character herself.

title: Sakura's Indie-Label Love
overview: Sakura, an avid fan of indie rock band U-memishi, falls in love with its vocalist Kuuga. She invites Misaki and Shizuko to a tea party with the entire band. To the girls' dismay, Kuuga takes an interest in Misaki and ignores Sakura.

title: The Secret of Takumi Usui Approaches!
overview: One day, Usui meets Misaki's mother and helps her carry her apples. As thanks, she invites him over to her house for tea. Misaki drags him to the park, warning him not to come to her home again. Sakura and Shizuko see them and think they're dating.

title: Maid Sama & the Sports Festival
overview: It's the Seika High Sports Festival, and Misaki wins every event for the girls. At the obstacle race, where first prize is a kiss from a horrified Sakura, Misaki is leading until one of the boys pushes her into the pool to disqualify her.

title: Idiots & Juveniles & Heroes &...
overview: Aratake, the strongest delinquent in school, and his gang can't believe Naoya Shirakawa, a former gang leader himself, has gone soft; so the gang abducts a cross-dressing Yukimura, who they mistake for Naoya's girlfriend.

title: Soutane Kano of Class 1-7
overview: The Student Council plans to hold an open house at Seika High to attract more girls to enroll there. However, a girl-hating freshman named Soutarou Kanou is against it, and interferes with their work by hypnotizing them to derail their efforts.

title: Bespectacled Rabbit at the Open Campus
overview: Soutarou is shocked to find out that Misaki was able to stay awake until the 24-hour time limit. As punishment, Misaki forces Soutarou to help Sakura, Shizuko, and the girls at the upcoming Open House's cafeteria.

title: Maid Latte at the Beach House
overview: It's the summer vacation, and the Maid Latte crew have been invited by Satsuki's sister Nagisa to her beach resort, with Aoi tagging along; and Usui recruited as a bodyguard by Satsuki, chagrining Misaki.

title: Usui Becomes the Enemy
overview: It's the second day of the Maid Latte crew's vacation at the beach house. Nagisa is allowing Aoi to cross-dress if he wins the beach volleyball tournament held near the beach house, with the winning team becoming Beach Prince and Princess as well.

title: Maid Sama is a Footman
overview: The Miyabigaoka Student Council aims to buy Maid Latte in a hostile takeover and replace it with a butler cafe. The only way for Misaki to stop this is to don a disguise and join the male-only footman auditions.

title: Footman Through a Change of Pairs
overview: In the second round of the footman auditions, Usui and Misaki succeed in the required task of setting up a high class table for afternoon tea. But before the third round begins, Misaki falls off the stage.

title: The Vice President is a Prince?! / Aoi and Her Fun Companions
overview: Yukimura's little sister Ruri loves playing make-believe princess but refuses to acknowledge her brother. When she meets "prince-like" Usui, Yukimura manages to get Usui to go on a date with his sister in order to gain her favor.

title: Usui's Rival?! Hinata Shintani
overview: Misaki orders the sports clubs to clean up their club rooms. Meanwhile, a transfer student named Hinata Shintani arrives and irks Misaki due to his childish behavior and gluttony.

title: Tag at the Forest School
overview: It is the Seika High Outdoor field trip, and the students have been tricked into enduring a hard life of Enlightenment at a Buddhist temple for five days. As Misaki deals with the girls' interest in her relationship with Hinata, she also has to prevent Hinata and Usui, both vying for her attention, from fighting.

title: Maid Latte & a Whole Bunch of Sweets
overview: Erika asks Misaki for help when she promised a customer a date--which is against Maid Latte policy. However, Hinata joins the contest and wins, and gets to choose a maid of his choice to take a picture with him. Unfortunately, "Misa" is on the list, which Hinata naturally chooses.

title: Lovey-Dovey Through Latte Magic ♥
overview: The rivalry between Hinata and Usui gets more tense than ever. When the two flare up in the student council room, Misaki throws both of them out for fighting. Meanwhile, the Maid Latte maids are cosplaying as characters from the anime "Maid Witches."

title: Hinata & Misaki & Usui
overview: Hinata reminiscences about his past. At Maid Latte, the café hosts a Fortune Telling Day with Erika as the fortune teller-- who gives Usui a depressing fortune regarding his future with Misaki.

title: Too Cruel Ayuzawa & Usui the Idiot!
overview: Misaki and Usui decide to enjoy the festival together, and end up joining a contest called 'Love Trial.' The prize is a premium ticket to the post-festival event, and the only rule is that you must never let go of your partner's hand.
